summary: Slice 6 (AI personalisation via Anthropic claude-sonnet-4-6 through emergentintegrations) verified end-to-end. Backend: 6/6 pytest cases PASS (test_ammiai_slice6_ai.py) covering GET /api/ai/status, POST /api/ai/plan/week (live AI, meta.source='ai', 7 days sorted asc starting today UTC, every day carries non-empty ai_reason + ai_source='ai'), GET /api/ai/plan/week (cached:true), DELETE /api/ai/plan/week (cleared:true + cached:false + week_cached:false), and hard-delete /api/account cascading purge of ai_weekly_plans. Live AI call latency was ~15.6s. Frontend Playwright (390x844): sign-in with +919000012345 / 123456 succeeded, Plan tab reached, toggle-week reveals ai-week-header + ai-personalise-btn, tapping the button surfaces ai-toast 'Week personalised with AI ✨' after ~15s wait, all 7 week-ai-reason-YYYY-MM-DD rows render with rich italic Tamil reasons (first: 'Adai with Paruppu Kuzhambu gives balanced protein; Milagu Rasam suits medium spice well.'), tapping a week-day card opens Day Detail where day-ai-reason renders, and switching back to toggle-today shows today-ai-reason without crashing. No blocking issues found.

react_native_issues.issue: 'shadow*' style props still deprecated; use 'boxShadow'. Reference: frontend/src/theme.ts (open since iteration_2, informational only).
'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents.' (open since iteration_4, informational only).
'Listening to push token changes is not yet fully supported on web.' — documented behaviour, no action required.

action_items: None blocking. Slice 6 AI layer is green on backend and frontend. Optional: address the long-standing shadow*/pointerEvents deprecation warnings noted in prior iterations.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/ai_planner.py cleanly separates prompt build → Anthropic call → strict JSON validation → 1-retry → silent fallback to candidate[0]. Validation checks date coverage, candidate_index in {0,1,2}, recipe_id membership per slot, and non-empty reason — solid guardrails.

server.py POST /api/ai/plan/week persists every chosen candidate to meal_plans (upsert per user_id+date) stamped with ai_reason + ai_source, and caches the pick set in ai_weekly_plans keyed by (user_id, week_start). GET rebuilds days from meal_plans so ai_reason is always fresh.
server.py GET /api/ai/status correctly derives week_cached and week_start from ai_weekly_plans; verified True after POST and False after DELETE.
Hard-delete cascade includes ai_weekly_plans — verified by re-signin with same phone returning week_cached=false.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 7 requested assertions passed: toggle-week, ai-week-header, ai-personalise-btn, ai-toast, >=1 week-ai-reason (got 7), day-ai-reason, toggle-today no crash)

seed_data_creation: Backend pytest: created a fresh mock user +9199XXXXXXXX per run, seeded profile (veg / household 2 / medium spice) + 3 pantry items from GET /api/ingredients (spinach_palak first), then ran the AI flow twice (once for AI-plan assertions and once inside the cascade test before DELETE /api/account which cleans up). Frontend Playwright reused shared +919000012345 / 123456 user — that account is intentionally NOT deleted at the end so subsequent testers can inspect a populated AI week without paying another 15s AI-latency.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI slice is GREEN. Test recipe used — Backend: pytest backend/tests/test_ammiai_slice6_ai.py, 6 tests, ~31s total (AI POST takes 15-20s so timeout ≥ 60s is essential). Endpoint payload notes: GET /api/ingredients returns objects keyed by 'ingredient_id' (NOT 'id'); phone-send validator requires +91 followed by exactly 10 digits, so use +9199XXXXXXXX format. Frontend: sign-in path is sign-in-phone-btn → phone-input '9000012345' → phone-send-btn → otp-input '123456' → optional otp-name-input → otp-verify-btn. Plan-tab testIDs verified live: plan-screen, toggle-today, toggle-week, ai-week-header, ai-personalise-btn, ai-toast, week-ai-reason-<YYYY-MM-DD>, week-day-<YYYY-MM-DD>, today-ai-reason, day-ai-reason. AI call latency 10-25s so give the ai-toast selector up to 60s. Anthropic model in use = claude-sonnet-4-6 (NOT 4-5). ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is present in /app/backend/.env and works.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no issues found. All backend endpoints returned expected shapes/values with the live Anthropic call, and all frontend testIDs rendered as designed.
